svg.text: ① Composed, not custom — bank1 configures the 1 Suite (finance1 + customer1) for banking; built fast on proven products.
② Human decides credit & money — agents draft & flag; people approve every lending, payment & risk decision.
③ Compliant by design — RBI alignment, AML / KYC, fair-lending & model-risk governance baked in.
④ Grounded & cited — every figure ties to the system of record; no hallucinated balances or terms.
⑤ Assured before go-live — assure1's independent risk, fairness & compliance evals issue a Trust Mark; run1 keeps it reliable.
⑥ Outcome-led — onboarding speed, cost, fraud & reconciliation, measured — delivered via the elan1 method.
